headline: Prediction: NextEra Energy's $67 Billion Dominion Acquisition Could Spur More Utility Deals. This Tie-Up Could be Next.
summary: Any combination is possible. There's one particular one, however, that just makes good logistical and geographic sense.

headline: Dominion to buy land for North Carolina offshore wind project
summary: VIRGINIA BEACH — Dominion Energy will purchase 32 acres in a Virginia Beach business park for an onshore substation and grid connection point to serve a wind farm project planned off the coast of North Carolina. The land sale in Corporate Landing Business Park was approved at a Development Authority meeting on Tuesday. The authority owns the property and had originally approved Dominion’s ...

headline: Elevate, ArcLight Bring Energy Storage Facility Online in Virginia
summary: Elevate Infrastructure and ArcLight Capital Partners on June 11 announced the companies have begun operating the 150-MW/600-MWh Prospect Power battery energy storage project in Rockingham County, Virginia.

raw.headline: Elevate, ArcLight Bring Energy Storage Facility Online in Virginia
raw.summary: Elevate Infrastructure and ArcLight Capital Partners on June 11 announced the companies have begun operating the 150-MW/600-MWh Prospect Power battery energy storage project in Rockingham County, Virginia.

headline: Elevate and ArcLight Bring Prospect Power Online; Largest Standalone Battery Storage Facility in PJM Supports Virginia's Expanding Energy Needs
summary: Elevate Infrastructure ("Elevate") and ArcLight Capital Partners ("ArcLight") celebrated the ribbon cutting of Prospect Power Storage ("Prospect Power"), following the successful completion and commencement of operations of the 150 Megawatt (MW) / 600 Megawatt hour (MWh) battery energy storage facility in Rockingham County, Virginia.
